ideal_must_detect.matched_text: selective disclosure to analysts is prohibited
retail DPT e-wallet integration with AnViet Chain
premature disclosure could influence NamLinh’s valuation

must_detect.matched_text:
On 27 May 2026, our SIEM flagged anomalous outbound access to a restricted ShareDrive containing draft ESG assurance reports and a green loan term sheet prepared for HOSE CBTT.
Per Decree 13, limited PII—employee names, work emails, salted citizen ID hashes, and internal payroll bank account aliases—was accessed; no raw account numbers or passwords were taken.
Mr. Trần Quang Minh (Deputy CFO) identified an external share-link created without approval; please coordinate via Ms. Lê Thu Vân at incident@namlinh.vn or +84 27 9999 5588.
The compromised folder also held unreleased emissions baseline data and tentative HOSE listing timetable adjustments that have not been publicly disclosed through Ủy ban Chứng khoán Nhà nước (UBCKNN/SSC).
We have opened and updated an insider list for the incident and ongoing ESG-linked loan discussions with TinPhong Bank, and imposed a blackout window for senior management until a formal CBTT is filed.
Information barriers between TechOps and Treasury were reinforced; vendors (e.g., KienAn Cloud Ltd.) are restricted under NDA, and staff are reminded that selective disclosure to analysts is prohibited.
Our Sandbox Lab had working notes on a retail DPT e-wallet integration with AnViet Chain; any token issuance references remain exploratory and non-public, and must not be tipped externally.
The green loan draft includes provisional coupon step-ups tied to emissions intensity and commercially sensitive ESG audit fees; premature disclosure could influence NamLinh’s valuation.
Operational steps taken: all public share-links invalidated, API keys rotated, IAM roles trimmed, and notices sent to SBV and SSC; forensics indicate an 11-minute read-only session with no lateral movement.
Accounts Payable has deferred a vendor invoice that referenced “pre-pricing ESG loan deck” to avoid embedding MNPI in routine payment memos.
A general client webinar on information barriers, insider lists, and crypto market terminology will be delivered as educational content only, with no issuer-specific or deal-stage materials.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation

uncertain.reason: References Vietnam citizen ID in hashed form without actual CCCD numbers; sensitive but not captured by vn_cccd rule.
Mentions bank account-related identifiers (aliases) without specific account numbers; may be PII but not covered by bank_account rule.
Refers to union communication channel but does not identify individual trade union membership.
Indicates contingent pricing terms for a green loan without numeric rates; commercially sensitive but not matched by numeric financial rules.
